SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.storage

Class StalwartStorageProcessor

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.storage.AbstractStorageProcessor
com.mimecast.robin.storage.StalwartStorageProcessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
StorageProcessor
public class StalwartStorageProcessor extends AbstractStorageProcessor
Delivers inbound local mail directly into Stalwart using its native JMAP ingest path.

    • processInternal

      protected boolean processInternal(Connection connection, EmailParser emailParser) throws IOException
      Description copied from class: AbstractStorageProcessor
      Internal processing logic to be implemented by subclasses.

      This method is called only if no chaos header forces a return value.

      Specified by:
      processInternal in class AbstractStorageProcessor
      Parameters:
      connection - Connection instance.
      emailParser - EmailParser instance.
      Returns:
      Boolean.
      Throws:
      IOException - On I/O error.
